rows.label: tlk45300012_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Did you hear? Chairman Bahn
attacked the leaders' summit.

rows.label: tlk45300012_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Trying to make enemies of
Superbia and Invidia takes
some serious nerve.

rows.label: tlk45300012_03_msg0003
rows.name: I could never do that— no...

rows.label: tlk45300012_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I wouldn't even think of
doing something wicked.
